SEARCH
Package org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common

Class BridgeUtil

java.lang.Object
org.apache.arrow.datafusion.common.BridgeUtil
public final class BridgeUtil extends Object
Helpers used by *Bridge classes. Scoped to the downcall side of the FFI boundary: each method takes a Diplomat-generated opaque type (DfError, DfExprBytes, DfStringArray) returned by a Diplomat downcall and converts it into a Java-friendly form. Public because bridge classes live in several packages (execution, logical_expr, physical_expr, etc.).

This is distinct from:

  • NativeUtil (root package, package-private) — adapter-side helpers that work with raw long addresses handed in by Rust during trait upcalls.
  • ArrowFfiUtil (root package, package-private) — Arrow C Data Interface struct transfer (copy + clear-release for FFI_ArrowSchema / FFI_ArrowArray).

Canonical usage: 


 return BridgeUtil.unwrap("Failed to do X", () -> dfThing.doSomething(arg));
 try (DfStringArray names = dfCtx.catalogNames()) {
   return BridgeUtil.toList(names);
 }

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static byte[]
    toBytes(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfExprBytes bytes)
    Copy the bytes wrapped by a DfExprBytes into a Java byte[].
    static List<String>
    toList(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfStringArray arr)
    Copy the contents of a Diplomat-returned DfStringArray into an immutable List<String>.
    static void
    unwrap(String context, Runnable work)
    Void-returning variant of unwrap(String, Supplier).
    static <T> T
    unwrap(String context, Supplier<T> work)
    Invoke work and translate Diplomat errors.

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • unwrap

      public static <T> T unwrap(String context, Supplier<T> work)
      Invoke work and translate Diplomat errors. DfError (thrown by Diplomat-generated methods) becomes a NativeDataFusionError; any other exception is wrapped in a DataFusionError with context as the message.

    • unwrap

      public static void unwrap(String context, Runnable work)
      Void-returning variant of unwrap(String, Supplier).

    • toBytes

      public static byte[] toBytes(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfExprBytes bytes)
      Copy the bytes wrapped by a DfExprBytes into a Java byte[]. The caller is responsible for closing the DfExprBytes (typically via try-with-resources).

    • toList

      public static List<String> toList(org.apache.arrow.datafusion.generated.DfStringArray arr)
      Copy the contents of a Diplomat-returned DfStringArray into an immutable List<String>. The caller is responsible for closing the DfStringArray.
